readings.Aries: You are not too much. You are, however, misdirected. Adjust the trajectory. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Taurus: What you've cultivated deserves to be enjoyed, not just maintained. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Gemini: There's a feeling underneath the thinking. Stop analysing it long enough to feel it. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Cancer: You've been managing your emotions rather than feeling them. There's a difference. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Leo: The recognition you crave is available in the form of self-recognition. It lasts longer. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Virgo: You've been in service mode for long enough that you've forgotten what you wanted. Remember. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Libra: You see all sides. You also avoid standing on any of them. Today, pick a side. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Scorpio: There is a relationship that exists entirely underground between you and someone else. It deserves light. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Sagittarius: Something you believed absolutely is no longer something you believe absolutely. That's growth. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Capricorn: The thing you are in service of — your family, your work, your future self — check that it still deserves the service. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Aquarius: You have been right about this for a long time. It is not yet time to say 'I told you so.' The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Pisces: The boundary between you and other people is more permeable than average. This is your gift and your difficulty. The timing is better than it feels.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
